notes: Pooled panel: forward_5d_RV ~ const + HAR + cs + asset_FE, with asset-clustered standard errors. Built on H3 2020-2024 across all 10 assets. cs is significant negative under asset FE (cross-sectional dispersion signal), but flips sign and becomes insignificant under two-way FE. Interpretation: the cascade slope is a cross-sectional phenomenon - when one asset has a high slope relative to others at a given date, its forward vol is lower. The within-asset time-series component is not robust to absorbing date fixed effects.
